expectations.text: fetches-api-to-find-chapter-tracks: Response is based on the actual API data (not just general knowledge about Superteam)
expectations.evidence: Response shows 20 chapter tracks with exact slugs, USDG amounts, and correct sponsor names — this is only possible from the API data.

expectations.text: identifies-chapter-specific-tracks: Response identifies tracks run by Superteam regional chapters
expectations.evidence: Response has a full table of 20 regional chapter tracks correctly identified as those where sponsor.chapter is non-null.

expectations.text: mentions-georgia-track: Response specifically mentions the Superteam Georgia track and its reward
expectations.evidence: Response mentions 'Colosseum Frontier Hackathon — Superteam Georgia Track | 10,000 USDG' as the first entry.
